title: The expulsion from Baghdad of al-Hasan b. Sahl's representative in the city, 'Ali b. Hishim; the fighting between the Sahlid forces and the leader of the Baghdad rebels, Muhammad b. Abi Khilid; the pr
description: The expulsion from Baghdad of al-Hasan b. Sahl's representative in the city, 'Ali b. Hishim; the fighting between the Sahlid forces and the leader of the Baghdad rebels, Muhammad b. Abi Khilid; the pr. Recorded under the year 201 AH (c. 817 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
